column1: Step 2 - Data Collection                                                          Execute supplemental data collection as identified in step 1.  This includes reviewing multiple sources that may include:  Supplier's internal marketing material, supplier's website, review of S1 information for companies that are public, on-line sources e.g. MSN investor.com / Quicken.com.  Trade publications, financial anlyst reports, chat rooms and competitor websites are all additional sources of information you can use.

column1: 1A - Market Overview:                                                                                             Perform a baseline analysis of the client's market to include market identification, current trends, segmentation, factors fueling and limiting growth, and potential new entrants into the markets. Client may use this information to drive primary market research services.
column3: *Research information and complete market overview template.

column1: 1B - Competitive Analysis:                                                                            Conduct a comprehensive overview of the client's competitive landscape to include players in the market, key differentiating factors of competitors and how they are positioned in the market.  Information captured is critical "groundwork" that is used for product positioning strategy.
